steps.display_text: AhaSlides Surveys work in two modes — share a standalone link, or drop the survey into your presentation as a live slide.
steps.tts_text: AhaSlides Surveys work in two modes — share a standalone link, or drop the survey into your presentation as a live slide.

steps.display_text: Click Surveys in the left sidebar to get started.
steps.tts_text: Click Surveys in the left sidebar to get started.

steps.display_text: Here's the Surveys dashboard — create from AI, a template, or from scratch.
steps.tts_text: Here's the Surveys dashboard — create from AI, a template, or from scratch.

steps.display_text: Build with Multiple Choice, Rating Scale, Open-ended, or Matrix questions — mix types in any order.
steps.tts_text: Build with Multiple Choice, Rating Scale, Open-ended, or Matrix questions — mix types in any order.

steps.display_text: Hit Publish, copy the respondent link, and share it anywhere.
steps.tts_text: Hit Publish, copy the respondent link, and share it anywhere.

steps.display_text: Or add a Survey slide to your presentation — when you reach it, the full survey appears live on every device.
steps.tts_text: Or add a Survey slide to your presentation — when you reach it, the full survey appears live on every device.
